description: Segmented-creature arcade shooter — a chain of body segments descends through an obstacle field, player shoots from the bottom row, segments break into independent pieces. Canvas-rendered, RAF loop, IBM Plex Mono retro typography, localStorage high score.
qualityNotes: Hand-curated working segmented-enemy logic + obstacle-field collision. Mono-font reference look. Preserve the segment-array data structure and per-segment update step when modifying.
